serverInfo.name: a2a-bridge-mcp
serverInfo.description: MCP server for agent-to-agent communication — capability discovery, task delegation, and result aggregation across MCP agents
serverInfo.author: THRONE AI

tools.name: register_agent
tools.description: Register an agent with capabilities, input/output schemas for discovery

tools.name: discover_agents
tools.description: Find agents matching a capability need with fuzzy matching and scoring

tools.name: delegate_task
tools.description: Delegate a task to a specific agent with timeout and status tracking

tools.name: get_task_result
tools.description: Get result or status of a previously delegated task

tools.name: broadcast_task
tools.description: Send a task to all matching agents and aggregate results

tools.name: get_agent_card
tools.description: Get an agent's full capability card (A2A-inspired)

tools.name: list_agents
tools.description: List all registered agents, optionally filtered by capability

resources.description: All registered agents and their capabilities

pricing.enterprise: $499/month — SSO, audit logs, custom routing policies
